App_Subtitle: Translation manager for The Coffin of Andy and Leyley
Install_Subtitle: Add a fan translation to your game: from a folder, a ZIP download, or a dialogue.txt/.csv.
Install_GameNotFound_Hint: Select the game folder that contains Game.exe.
Install_InvalidGameFolder: That folder doesn't look like an installation of The Coffin of Andy and Leyley.
Install_DropHint2: Folder, ZIP archive, dialogue.txt, or dialogue.csv, including the dialogue.txt made in the editor
Install_ReplaceWarning: "{0}" is already installed. Installing will replace it (a backup is created automatically).
Install_Success_Text: Start the game and pick your language under "Language" in the main menu.
Install_Success_Backup: The previous version was moved to the backup folder.
Community_Intro: Community-made translations. One click downloads and installs them.
Community_LoadError: Could not load the catalog. Are you online?
Community_Empty: There are no translations in the catalog right now.
Community_VersionMismatch: May not match your game version ({0}).
Community_InstalledDone: Installed! Start the game and pick your language in the “Language” menu.
Community_InstalledReplaced: Updated! The previous version was moved to a backup.
Community_DownloadFailed: Download failed. Check your internet connection and try again.
Community_NoGame: No game folder found. Please select the game above first.
Warning_MultipleTranslations: This source contains more than one translation. Only the first one will be installed.
Warning_Encoding: The dialogue file is not valid UTF-8. Special characters may look wrong in the game.
Error_PathNotFound: The selected path no longer exists.
Error_NoDialogueFound: No translation found. The source contains no dialogue.txt, dialogue.csv, or .cld file.
Error_UnsupportedArchive: RAR and 7z archives are not supported. Please extract the archive first, then choose the extracted folder.
Error_ArchiveReadFailed: The archive could not be opened. It may be corrupted.
Error_UnsupportedFileType: This file type cannot be installed as a translation.
Error_GameFolderMissing: The game folder is missing or invalid. Please select it again.
Error_ReservedName: This name cannot be used for a translation.
Error_ZipSlip: The archive contains unsafe file paths and was not installed.
Manage_Subtitle: Everything currently inside the game's languages folder.
Manage_NoGame: No game folder selected. Set it up on the Install page first.
Manage_Unrecognized: No translation data found in this folder.
Settings_DefaultFont_Hint: Pre-filled when you start a new translation from the game (empty = GameFont). Applies to the next new project.
Settings_BackupHint: Replaced or removed translations are moved here. This app never deletes anything permanently.
Settings_About_Text: CoffinTranslate is an unofficial, open-source fan tool for managing translations of The Coffin of Andy and Leyley. It is not affiliated with Kit9 Studio. No game content is distributed with this tool.
Editor_Subtitle: Advanced: translate the game yourself, string by string, no spreadsheets.
Editor_Start_Create_Hint: Loads every source string from your game and creates a blank translation to fill in.
Editor_Start_Open_Hint: Open a saved project (.ctproj, your progress is kept exactly) or import a dialogue.txt or dialogue.csv. Source text is matched from your game.
Editor_NeedGame: Set up your game folder on the Install page first. The editor reads the source text from it.
Editor_Loading: Loading source text from the game…
Editor_TagWarning: Formatting codes differ from the source. Check \c[…], \fi, \fb, \fr.
Editor_OpenTitle: Open a dialogue.txt or dialogue.csv file
Editor_ExportTitle: Choose where to export the translation
Editor_NeedLanguageName: Enter a language name before exporting.
Editor_ExportDone: Exported to {0}. You can install it from the Install page.
Editor_ExportDoneMissing: Exported to {0}. Note: {1} replacement image file(s) were missing and were skipped.
Editor_ExportZipDone: Saved as ZIP: {0}. You can install it from the Install page.
Editor_ExportZipDoneMissing: Saved as ZIP: {0}. Note: {1} replacement image file(s) were missing and were skipped.
Editor_RecentMissing: "{0}" was not found. The file was moved or deleted.
Editor_Font_Watermark: GameFont or a file name (e.g. MyFont.ttf)
Editor_Font_PreviewText: Your translation will look like this: 0123 ÄÖÜ ßäöü
Editor_Credits_Hint: Shown in the game's language picker. Keep them short, the menu is narrow.
Editor_JumpLastEdit_Tip: Jump to the line you edited last
Editor_Badge_New_Tip: New or changed since the last game version. Please review.
Editor_VersionMismatch: This project is based on game version {0}, but {1} is installed. Some text may have changed. Double-check the export after the game update.
Editor_Update_Tip: Pull in new and changed lines from the current game version (your translations are kept).
Editor_UpdateDone: Updated: {0} new, {1} changed line(s), flagged as "New".
Editor_UpdateNone: Already up to date. No new or changed lines.
Editor_Images_Intro: Images that contain text can be replaced with your own PNGs. The game's original is on the left, your replacement on the right. Selected images are written out on export.
Editor_Images_Missing: Replacement file not found. Please pick it again.
Editor_Images_None: No translatable images were found in this game.
Editor_Images_NeedGame: Images need your game folder. Set it up on the Install page first.
